context: Tests that the agent removes a hardcoded password from a Fluent Bit config and replaces it with an environment variable reference, adds the missing tail-input safety fields, and documents required env vars.

checklist.name: Password via env var
checklist.description: HTTP_Passwd uses ${ENV_VAR} syntax (e.g., ${HTTP_PASSWD} or ${FLUENTBIT_PASSWORD}) — the literal string 'secretpassword123' does NOT appear in the config

checklist.name: No plaintext secret
checklist.description: No password, token, or key appears as a literal string value anywhere in the config file

checklist.name: Env var documented
checklist.description: The notes.md (or equivalent output) names the environment variable(s) that the deployment team must inject

checklist.name: Mem_Buf_Limit added
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin now includes a Mem_Buf_Limit setting

checklist.name: DB path added
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin now includes a DB setting for position tracking

checklist.name: tls.verify present
checklist.description: The OUTPUT plugin includes tls.verify On, or tls.verify Off with an explanatory comment

checklist.name: Retry_Limit present
checklist.description: The OUTPUT plugin retains a numeric Retry_Limit (not False)

checklist.name: storage.total_limit_size
checklist.description: The OUTPUT plugin or SERVICE section includes a storage.total_limit_size setting

checklist.name: compression gzip
checklist.description: The HTTP OUTPUT plugin includes Compress gzip or compression gzip
